short.en: Functional 3D-printed buckle with full strength calculation and material trade-off.
short.sl: Funkcionalna 3D natisnjena zaponka s polnim izračunom trdnosti in primerjavo materialov.

description.en: A replacement buckle that has to survive a daily 12 kg load with a safety factor. The full design memo — material choice between Bambu PLA Basic and PETG, cross-section sizing, expected stress at the latch — sits in the case study. Printed, used daily, still in service.
description.sl: Nadomestna zaponka, ki mora vsakodnevno prenesti 12 kg z varnostnim faktorjem. Celoten razvojni zapis — izbira med Bambu PLA Basic in PETG, dimenzioniranje prereza, pričakovana napetost na zaskoku — je v študiji primera. Natisnjena, v vsakodnevni rabi, še vedno deluje.

details.en: Stress calculated as σ = F/A on the narrowest cross-section. With F = 12 kg × 9.81 m/s² × 1.5 (safety factor) ≈ 177 N and a target σ_allow of 30 MPa for Bambu PLA Basic in tension, the minimum cross-section comes out at ~5.9 mm². Final geometry uses 4 mm × 6 mm = 24 mm², a 4× margin against creep over time.
details.sl: Napetost izračunana kot σ = F/A na najožjem prerezu. Z F = 12 kg × 9,81 m/s² × 1,5 (varnostni faktor) ≈ 177 N in dovoljeno σ_dop 30 MPa za Bambu PLA Basic na nateg, najmanjši prerez znaša ~5,9 mm². Končna geometrija uporablja 4 mm × 6 mm = 24 mm², kar pomeni 4× rezervo proti lezenju materiala.
